method: Outside-in crawl (browser UA, robots-respecting — cuny.edu/robots.txt sets a 30s crawl-delay and disallows /search/, /wp-admin/, /wp-content/plugins/, etc.). Fingerprinted www.cuny.edu as WordPress Multisite (nginx; wp-json REST responds 200; wp-content/uploads/sites/<n>/ paths; WPBakery Page Builder + Slider Revolution generators). Identified CUNYfirst as Oracle PeopleSoft Campus Solutions from its PIA URLs (cssa.cunyfirst.cuny.edu/psc/cnycsprd/GUEST/SA/c/...GBL; home.cunyfirst.cuny.edu redirects to /psc/cnyihprd/EMPLOYEE/EMPL/c/NUI_FRAMEWORK.PT_LANDINGPAGE.GBL — PeopleSoft Fluid behind an F5 BIG-IP). Verified the NYC Open Data agency label 'City University of New York (CUNY)' via the Socrata Discovery API: it returns exactly ONE asset, and that asset is an external-link (href), not a dataset. A q=CUNY search surfaces only one genuinely CUNY-subject dataset, tagged to OMB not CUNY.
headline_findings: CUNY is a FEDERATED system: ~25 colleges and schools, each with its own website, all on a shared WordPress Multisite (cuny.edu, nginx) and a single shared Oracle PeopleSoft Campus Solutions student information system branded CUNYfirst.

CUNY is a New York STATE public benefit corporation, not a NYC agency — so unlike NYCHA, DOE, or the Council it publishes NOTHING under a CUNY agency label on NYC Open Data. The label returns exactly one asset, and it is an external link, not a dataset.

Its reference data is scattered: campus directories and program search are HTML on cuny.edu; enrollment/demographics are PDF/Excel data books from the Office of Institutional Research and Assessment (OIRA); state enrollment tables live on data.ny.gov. None is a clean API.

The transactional system of record — applications, courses, enrollment, financial aid — is CUNYfirst (PeopleSoft), reachable only through login-optional guest self-service screens (/psc/...GBL). No public API, no OpenAPI, no JSON.

Net-new write surface: submit a CUNY admissions application (AdmissionsApplication) — the single most common prospective-student transaction, covering multiple campuses in one application, with no API today. See tech-stack.md and apis-observed.md.

apis_observed.note: CUNYfirst — admissions (CU_E1385_CNSLR_FL), course catalog browse (SSS_BROWSE_CATLG), enrollment, financial aid. Server-rendered PeopleSoft PIA (/psc/, .GBL, PT_LANDINGPAGE), JavaScript-only, no JSON/OpenAPI. Behind an F5 BIG-IP.
Central site + ~25 federated college subsites. WPBakery + Slider Revolution. wp-json responds but is content-only; no product/reference API.
'Explore Programs' degree-program finder; no documented backing API exposed to consumers.
CUNY Academic Works — faculty/research output; OAI-PMH harvest per college, no unified REST API.
Effectively ZERO CUNY presence: the CUNY agency label returns one external-link asset; one CUNY-subject budget dataset (wusu-mzmq) is tagged to OMB.
State-level SUNY/CUNY enrollment tables live on the STATE portal, not the city's — reflecting CUNY's status as a state public benefit corporation.

fruit.name: Colleges & Schools (~25 campuses)
fruit.notes: The federated core — senior colleges, community colleges, graduate/professional schools, Macaulay Honors. HTML directory on cuny.edu + institution records in CUNYfirst. No Open Data twin.

fruit.name: Degree & Certificate Programs (Explore Programs)
fruit.notes: Client-rendered program finder across all campuses; associate through doctoral + certificates. No public API, no Open Data twin.

fruit.name: Course Catalog / Class Schedule
fruit.notes: The catalog browse lives inside CUNYfirst PeopleSoft guest self-service (SSS_BROWSE_CATLG). JavaScript-only, no API.

fruit.name: Enrollment & Demographics (OIRA data book)
fruit.notes: Office of Institutional Research and Assessment publishes enrollment, degrees, and demographics as data books — AGGREGATE ONLY. State tables also on data.ny.gov. No per-student record is ever published (FERPA).

fruit.name: Faculty & Research (CUNY Academic Works)
fruit.notes: Faculty directories (HTML per college) + the CUNY Academic Works institutional repository (bepress; OAI-PMH harvest). No unified REST API.

fruit.name: CUNY Community College Expenditures (budget)
opendata_match: CUNY Community College Expenditures By Source wusu-mzmq (5c) — tagged to OMB, not CUNY
fruit.notes: The ONE machine-readable CUNY-subject asset on NYC Open Data — a city budget rollup, published by the Mayor's Office of Management & Budget, not by CUNY. Financial, not academic.

fruit.name: Apply to CUNY (CUNY Application)
fruit.notes: The single most common prospective-student transaction — one application covering multiple campuses. Runs inside CUNYfirst (CU_E1385_CNSLR_FL). No API and no Open Data twin. The net-new WRITE surface for this domain.

fruit.name: Check application status
fruit.notes: Track an admissions decision — CUNYfirst-only; no API.

fruit.name: Register for classes / enrollment
fruit.notes: Enroll in courses — CUNYfirst PeopleSoft self-service only; no API.

fruit.name: Financial aid application
fruit.notes: FAFSA/TAP-linked aid packaging surfaces in CUNYfirst; no API. An alternative net-new write surface.

meta.platform: WordPress Multisite (nginx) + Oracle PeopleSoft Campus Solutions (CUNYfirst)
meta.tagline: One owned API to federate ~25 campuses' reference data and unlock the CUNYfirst application it now hides.
meta.headline: CUNY is a state public-benefit corporation whose ~25 campuses share one WordPress and one PeopleSoft ERP — publishing nothing to NYC Open Data and hiding every transaction behind CUNYfirst.

scorecard_notes.platform: Modern-ish: WordPress Multisite on nginx, but plugin-heavy (WPBakery/Slider Revolution); core ERP is legacy Oracle PeopleSoft.
scorecard_notes.siteApi: wp-json REST responds but is content-only; no reference/product API; CUNYfirst has no public API.
scorecard_notes.openData: Effectively none on NYC Open Data — the CUNY agency label returns one external link, not a dataset.
scorecard_notes.coreData: Core entities exist but are HTML directories, a client-rendered program finder, PDF/Excel data books, and PeopleSoft screens — not machine-readable.
scorecard_notes.writeApi: No public write API; applications, enrollment, and aid live only in CUNYfirst self-service.
scorecard_notes.agent: No agent-native surface of any kind.
scorecard_notes.ownership: CUNY self-operates its own WordPress and CUNYfirst (via CUNY Computing & Information Services), but the SIS is a packaged Oracle ERP.
